'''Tev Aden''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Dictio L'varren]]'s [[Aide/Legends|aide]] on [[Indu San/Legends|Indu San]]. He was murdered by [[Council Authority]] [[Authority Officer|Officer]] [[Kaleb Darme]] in an attempt to frame the New Republic and bring the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] back to the [[Indu San system/Legends|Indu San system]]. [[Galactic News Network]] reporter [[Kella Rand]] recorded Darme on her [[Cam droid/Legends|hover-cam]] as he claimed to shoot Aden as a last resort, and then "discovered" a detonator on his dead body—in evidence planted by Darme against the New Republic.<ref name="FF">{
